transforms.code:
dbName = "mes_core"
    try:
        data = system.db.runPrepQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM defect_list", [], dbName)
        cnt = data.getValueAt(0, 0)
        return str(cnt) + ' records'
    except:
        return ''

config.script:
logger = system.util.getLogger("DefectList")
    table = self.parent.getSibling("defectListTable")
    selection_data = table.props.selection.data
    
    if not selection_data or len(selection_data) == 0:
        logger.warn("No defect selected")
        return
    
    row_data = list(selection_data)[0]
    defect_id = row_data["id"]
    defect_code = row_data["DefectCode"]
    
    confirm = system.perspective.confirm(
        'Delete ' + str(defect_code) + '?',
        'This removes the defect from the master list. Existing defect_log records will retain their data.'
    )
    
    if confirm:
        try:
            system.db.runPrepUpdate('DELETE FROM defect_list WHERE id = ?', [defect_id], 'mes_core')
            table.refreshBinding('props.data')
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error('Delete failed: {}'.format(str(e)))

config.script:
logger = system.util.getLogger('DefectList')
	
	root = self.parent.parent
	code = str(root.getChild('codeRow').getChild('codeInput').props.text or '').strip().upper()
	typeVal = root.getChild('typeRow').getChild('typeDropdown').props.value
	desc = str(root.getChild('descRow').getChild('descInput').props.text or '').strip()
	area = str(root.getChild('areaRow').getChild('areaDropdown').props.value or '')
	
	if not code:
		logger.warn('Defect code is required')
		return
	if not desc:
		logger.warn('Description is required')
		return
	
	try:
		username = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	except:
		username = 'admin'
	
	query = '''INSERT INTO defect_list (defect_code, defect_type, defect_description, revision, "user", "timestamp", area)
		VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)'''
	
	try:
		result = system.db.runPrepUpdate(query, [code, int(typeVal), desc, '1.0', username, area], 'mes_core')
		if result == 1:
			self.view.custom.showCreateForm = False
			root.parent.getChild('defectListTable').refreshBinding('props.data')
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error('Insert failed: {}'.format(str(e)))

textStyle.fontFamily: 'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif
'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif

transforms.code:
dbName = "mes_core"
    
    searchText = ''
    typeFilter = 0
    areaFilter = ''
    
    try:
        searchText = str(self.parent.getChild('searchBar').getChild('searchInput').props.text or '').strip()
    except:
        pass
    try:
        typeFilter = int(self.parent.getChild('filterBar').getChild('typeFilter').props.value or 0)
    except:
        typeFilter = 0
    try:
        areaFilter = str(self.parent.getChild('filterBar').getChild('areaFilter').props.value or '').strip()
    except:
        areaFilter = ''
    
    conditions = []
    params = []
    
    if searchText:
        conditions.append("(dl.defect_code ILIKE ? OR dl.defect_description ILIKE ?)")
        params.append('%' + searchText + '%')
        params.append('%' + searchText + '%')
    
    if typeFilter > 0:
        conditions.append("dl.defect_type = ?")
        params.append(typeFilter)
    
    if areaFilter:
        conditions.append("dl.area = ?")
        params.append(areaFilter)
    
    whereClause = ''
    if conditions:
        whereClause = 'WHERE ' + ' AND '.join(conditions)
    
    query = """
        SELECT 
            dl.id,
            dl.defect_code AS "DefectCode",
            dl.defect_description AS "DefectDescription",
            dl.defect_type AS "DefectType",
            CASE dl.defect_type
                WHEN 1 THEN 'Production'
                WHEN 2 THEN 'Quality'
                WHEN 3 THEN 'Material'
                WHEN 4 THEN 'Shipping'
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END AS "TypeName",
            dl.area AS "Area",
            dl.revision AS "Revision",
            dl."user" AS "User",
            dl."timestamp" AS "TimeStamp"
        FROM defect_list dl
        {}
        ORDER BY dl.defect_type, dl.defect_code
    """.format(whereClause)
    
    try:
        data = system.db.runPrepQuery(query, params, dbName)
        if data.getRowCount() > 0:
            column_names = data.getColumnNames()
            json_data = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(data)
            return [{ col: row[col] for col in column_names } for row in json_data]
        else:
            return []
    except Exception as e:
        system.util.getLogger("DefectList").error("Query failed: {}".format(str(e)))
        return []

config.script:
logger = system.util.getLogger('DefectList')
	
	table = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild('leftPanel').getChild('defectListTable')
	selection_data = table.props.selection.data
	
	if not selection_data or len(selection_data) == 0:
		logger.warn('No defect selected')
		return
	
	row_data = list(selection_data)[0]
	defect_id = row_data['id']
	
	formBody = self.parent.parent
	code = str(formBody.getChild('codeRow').getChild('input').props.text or '').strip()
	typeVal = formBody.getChild('typeRow').getChild('input').props.value
	desc = str(formBody.getChild('descRow').getChild('input').props.text or '').strip()
	area = str(formBody.getChild('areaRow').getChild('input').props.value or '')
	rev = str(formBody.getChild('revRow').getChild('input').props.text or '').strip()
	
	if not code or not desc:
		logger.warn('Code and description are required')
		return
	
	try:
		username = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	except:
		username = 'admin'
	
	query = '''
		UPDATE defect_list
		SET defect_code = ?,
		    defect_type = ?,
		    defect_description = ?,
		    area = ?,
		    revision = ?,
		    "user" = ?,
		    "timestamp" = NOW()
		WHERE id = ?
	'''
	
	try:
		system.db.runPrepUpdate(query, [code, int(typeVal), desc, area, rev, username, int(defect_id)], 'mes_core')
		table.refreshBinding('props.data')
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error('Update failed: {}'.format(str(e)))
